diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -31,7 +31,7 @@
         

         # SB3 might transpose the image to (B, C, H, W) if it thinks it's an RGB image.

         # If so, transpose it back to (B, H, W, C)

-        if image.shape[1] == 3 and image.shape[3] != 3:

+        if len(image.shape) == 4 and image.shape[1] == 3 and image.shape[3] != 3:

             image = image.permute(0, 2, 3, 1)

             

         obj = self.obj_emb(image[..., 0])

@@ -39,13 +39,25 @@
         state = self.state_emb(image[..., 2])

         

         x = torch.cat([obj, col, state], dim=-1)

-        x = x.permute(0, 3, 1, 2)

         

+        if len(x.shape) == 4:

+            x = x.permute(0, 3, 1, 2)

+        else:

+            x = x.permute(2, 0, 1)

+            

         cnn_out = self.cnn(x)

         

-        direction = observations["direction"].float()

+        direction = observations["direction"].long()

         if direction.dim() == 1:

-            direction = direction.view(1, -1)

+            direction = direction.view(-1, 1)

+            

+        if direction.shape[-1] == 1:

+            direction = torch.nn.functional.one_hot(direction.squeeze(-1), num_classes=4).float()

+        else:

+            direction = direction.float()

+            

+        if len(direction.shape) > 2:

+            direction = direction.reshape(direction.shape[0], -1)

             

         features = torch.cat([cnn_out, direction], dim=1)

         return self.linear(features)
